hero.title: Air Tricks Prod
hero.tagline: From wind to pixels — creative web developer

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: From idea to live — I handle everything.
services.web_creation_desc: Modern, responsive, and performant showcase websites — from domain name to continuous deployment.
services.integration_desc: Pixel-perfect mockup integration, faithful to the provided design.
services.redesign_desc: Modernize your existing site: design, performance, accessibility.
services.maintenance_desc: Technical support, updates, bug fixes and improvements.
services.optimization_desc: Performance, technical SEO and GEO — visible to humans, cited by AIs.
services.creative_desc: Professional video/editing experience — visual storytelling, intuitive UX, drone footage.
services.network_desc: 15 years of network engineering — infrastructure, security, architecture. Technical rigor in service of the web.
services.az_sub: Domain name, DNS, hosting, SSL, continuous deployment — the full infrastructure, not just the code.
services.step_brief_desc: Goals, audience, editorial tone, competitive benchmark.
services.step_design_desc: UX, mockups, visual identity, user experience.
services.step_dev_desc: Clean React/Vite, componentized, accessible — with Claude Code as co-pilot.
services.step_infra_desc: Domain, DNS, hosting, SSL, CI/CD. Everything invisible that keeps it running.
services.step_seo_step_desc: Optimized for humans and for AIs.
services.ai_desc: I use Claude Code as a daily co-pilot — component generation, refactoring, complex bug solving. Not a tool: a workflow.
services.seo_human_desc: Semantic structure, meta tags, Core Web Vitals, accessibility, XML sitemap. What Google reads to rank you.
services.seo_geo_desc: Schema.org structured data, llms.txt, answer-oriented content architecture. What ChatGPT, Claude and Perplexity read to cite you.
services.ownership_items: Domain · DNS · Hosting · SSL · CI/CD · Emails · Monitoring

about.title: About
about.intro: Creative web developer, former network engineer with an atypical career path.
about.network: 15 years of network engineering in IT — infrastructure, security, architecture.
about.kite: Professional kitesurf videographer and editor with Air Tricks Prod, in partnership with Bilene Kite Center in Mozambique.
about.dev: Transitioned to web development, certified by OpenClassrooms. The fusion of technical and creative.
about.name: Guillaume Etienne
